components.name: Status Bar
components.description: Standard iOS status bar displaying time (9:41), network signal, Wi-Fi status, and battery level.

components.name: Top Navigation Bar (Header)
elements: Daraz logo (center, text 'Daraz' with an orange polygon icon)
components.description: Fixed header providing global navigation access and a search function.

components.name: Promotional Carousel Banner 1
elements: Large image featuring a smiling woman using a mobile phone on a couch.
Orange overlay with white text: 'Freeshipping on orders above Rs. 2,999', 'Till 2pm'.
Call-to-action button: 'Shop Now' (yellow text on an orange background, rounded rectangle).
Small, grey pagination dots below the banner (indicating multiple items in a carousel).
components.description: A prominent, full-width banner used to showcase ongoing promotions, likely part of a horizontally scrollable carousel.

components.name: Campaign Banner 2
elements: Vibrant graphic with large orange text 'WOMEN OF WONDER' and dates '26th AUG - 1st SEP'.
Image of a cheerful woman holding a box filled with products.
Smaller text: 'AMAZING DISCOUNTS EVERYDAY, JUST FOR YOU.'
Call-to-action button: 'ADD TO CART >' (dark grey background, white text, arrow icon).
components.description: A visually striking banner highlighting a specific themed campaign, designed to capture immediate attention.

components.name: Primary Category Grid (Hexagonal Icons)
components.description: A horizontal row of 5 hexagonal icons, each representing a top-level product category with an illustrative image and text label below.

components.name: Section Header 'Categories'
components.description: A bold text label serving as a clear heading for the subsequent category listing.

components.name: Product/Sub-Category Grid
components.description: A two-row, four-column grid displaying product images and their corresponding text labels, likely for specific product types or sub-categories.

components.name: Floating Action Button (FAB)
elements: Circular button with a multi-color gradient icon
components.description: A small, circular button positioned in the bottom-right corner, potentially for quick actions, filters, or customer support. Its function is not explicitly labeled.

components.name: Bottom Navigation Bar
elements: Home (highlighted with orange icon, text, and underline)
components.description: A fixed bottom navigation bar providing quick access to five core sections of the application, with 'Home' currently selected.

layout_structure: The screen adheres to a standard mobile application layout, featuring a fixed top navigation bar and a fixed bottom navigation bar, enclosing a vertically scrollable content area. The content is organized into distinct horizontal sections: two prominent promotional banners (the first likely part of a carousel), followed by a horizontal grid of five primary categories (hexagonal icons). Below this, a section header 'Categories' introduces a denser two-row, four-column grid for specific products or sub-categories. Elements within the top bar are distributed with left, center, and right alignment. The content sections utilize varying grid structures to optimize space for different types of information.

color_scheme.usage_notes: Orange (#FF6B00) is the predominant brand color, used for the Daraz logo, 'Shop Now' button background, and the active 'Home' tab highlight. Yellow (#FFD700) is used for the 'Shop Now' button text. Campaign banners introduce vibrant secondary accents like light blue/cyan (#C8F5FA) and purple (#9932CC) to create visual appeal. White (#FFFFFF) serves as the main background and for high-contrast text on dark backgrounds. Black (#000000) and dark grey (#333333) are used for most text, icons, and inactive navigation items, ensuring readability against white.

typography.font_family: A clean, modern sans-serif typeface appears to be used throughout the UI (e.g., system default font like SF Pro Text on iOS, or similar fonts like Roboto/Open Sans).
font_sizes_weights: Large, Bold: 'Freeshipping on orders above Rs. 2,999' (white)
Medium, Bold: 'Categories' section header, 'Daraz' logo text
Medium, Regular: 'Shop Now', 'ADD TO CART', hexagonal category labels, 'Till 2pm'
Small, Regular: Product/sub-category grid labels, bottom navigation labels
Small, Light: 'AMAZING DISCOUNTS EVERYDAY, JUST FOR YOU.'
typography.hierarchy_notes: A clear typographic hierarchy is established using variations in font size, weight, and color. The largest and boldest text is reserved for primary headlines and calls-to-action, drawing immediate attention. Medium-sized text is used for section headers and button labels, while smaller, regular text is used for descriptive labels and secondary information, guiding the user's eye and indicating information importance.

spacing_and_density.padding_margins: Generous vertical padding separates major content blocks (banners, category grids), providing clear visual distinctions. Horizontal spacing within category grids is consistent, preventing items from feeling cramped. The top and bottom navigation bars also feature adequate internal padding for their elements.
spacing_and_density.item_density: The screen balances areas of low density (large promotional banners) with areas of moderate to high density (category grids). The hexagonal category grid maintains good spacing between items, while the product/sub-category grid packs more items into a smaller vertical space, indicating an efficient use of screen real estate for browsing.
spacing_and_density.visual_clutter: Despite the significant amount of content, the use of clear section dividers, distinct visual styles for different content types, and ample white space around banners helps to manage visual clutter and maintain a relatively clean aesthetic.

accessibility_observations: Most text elements exhibit good color contrast against their backgrounds, enhancing readability for users with various visual capabilities.
Interactive elements like buttons ('Shop Now', 'ADD TO CART') and navigation icons have sufficiently large tap targets, improving usability for touch interactions.

All navigation and category icons (bottom navigation, hexagonal categories, product categories) are accompanied by clear text labels, which is beneficial for users who may not recognize icons and for screen reader users.
The chosen sans-serif font is generally considered highly legible.
The Floating Action Button (FAB) lacks an explicit text label, which could make its purpose ambiguous for screen reader users or those unfamiliar with common FAB conventions.
notable_patterns: Standard Header-Content-Footer layout common in mobile applications.
Hamburger menu for accessing extensive navigation or settings.
Persistent Search icon in the header for universal search functionality.
Image carousels/banners with pagination dots for dynamic promotional content.
Grid layouts for efficient display and organization of product categories.
Floating Action Button (FAB) for a prominent, context-sensitive action.
Bottom Navigation Bar for intuitive and quick access to core application sections.
Clear Call-to-Action (CTA) buttons ('Shop Now', 'ADD TO CART') with contrasting styles.
Consistent brand identity maintained through the Daraz logo and primary orange color.
